properties.name: Bee Tree Surface Mine
properties.description:
Six headwaters streams will be directly affected by mining within the Bee Tree permit. The valley fills will cover 315 acres and 3 miles of streams.
  • Permit: S301004
  • Source Map Date: 20041001
  • Permittee: MARFORK COAL COMPANY INC
  • Facility_name: Bee Tree Surface Mine
  • Inspection Status: NS
  • Inspection Date: 7/29/2008
  • Permit Issue Date: 7/11/2006

properties.name: Leather Leaf Surface Mine
properties.description:
Six headwaters streams will be directly affected by mining within the Eagle III permit. The valley fills will cover 265 acres and 2.5 miles of streams.

Eagle III has since been renamed Leather Leaf, with slight boundary modifications. As of August 2, 2010, Massey did not have its mining permit approved for Leather Leaf.
